title: De-swirl the two flat-pupil pages
oneline: Deterministic pen-eye surgery fixed caterpillar-wide's flat night pupils end-to-end
summary: The flat pupils come from spiral-welded pen eyes collapsing the eye detector's nested-ring topology, so the chalk's polarity gate had no pupil core to protect and the chalk whitened whole eyeballs, which the punch then imposes on every night fill. A zero-API sharp/SVG surgery (erase eye interior, redraw pupil ellipse + detached catchlight with >=2.5px clearances) restored 4 detector cores at 100% registration; regenerating light+chalk+night on the fixed pen flipped the eyes audit from night-FAIL to ok. Ladybug-wide (true one-stroke spirals, outer ring included) was left for the real fix; the best night take still carries a non-eye drift warning (0.0056 vs 0.004, antenna glow) that a normal retry budget should clear.
tried: Diagnosed the shipped failure chain: spiral pen eyes -> findEyeCores topology collapse -> chalk whitens whole eyeball (polarity gate blind) -> punch flattens every night pupil
Flood-based erase that keeps only the eyeball ring (leaked through the spiral's opening; abandoned)
Fitted-ellipse interior erase + SVG two-circle redraw with numerically verified clearances (worked)
Regenerated light fill, chalk, and night fill on the fixed pen (7 Gemini calls) and re-punched
Full offline audit battery + simulated night composites before/after
worked: Deterministic de-swirl: cores 2 -> 4, ring depth 4, solidity 0, keep 100/100 fwd and 99.9/97.6 rev vs shipped pen
Chalk regen passed first try and kept a fillable pupil + chalk-ink catchlight (owl-style best case)
Night fill eyes lively in every take; eyes audit flipped caterpillar-wide night FAIL -> ok
Light fill passed first try at keep 100/100
failed: Flood-fill inside/outside separation (spiral opening leaks the sclera into the face white)
First surgery geometry (pupil rx13, catchlight r5.5): antialias welds re-broke one eye's topology
Best night take still 0.0056 drift vs 0.004 bar (antenna glow, not eyes) within the capped attempt budget
limitations: ladybug-wide not attempted: its eyes are one-stroke spirals including the outer ring, needing outer-ring redraw or the forced normalizer
surgery constants are hand-measured per page, not a general tool
thumbs not regenerated; repo fully reverted, nothing committed
no pipeline gate measures spiralness: outline audit passes these pens (ring depth 4), so the normalizer skips them without --force
